opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This throbbing in my jaw is driving me insane, and now my cheek is ballooning up so much I can barely open my mouth.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The tooth pain has become unbearable over the last day and my face is swelling up fast — the painkillers aren't touching it and I can hardly open my mouth.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about two days ago as a dull ache, then got sharply worse over the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 48 hours, much worse in the last half day
symptom_narrative.character: deep, pounding, throbbing pain in the lower right jaw
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had — I can't sleep, eat or think straight
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lower right back tooth and jaw, and now the cheek on that side is swollen
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — a cold pack takes the edge off for a minute
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: chewing, touching the tooth, and trying to open my mouth
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a horrible taste in my mouth and bad breath, feeling hot and shivery, and I can only open my mouth a couple of centimetres now
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: that tooth has been a bit sensitive for a while but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't eat or drink normally, pacing the room holding an ice pack, couldn't go to work

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: I've been taking heaps of it, more than the packet says, trying to get on top of the pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present and helping with the call; hasn't been able to get in to see a dentist

objective_data_offered.value: visible swelling of the right cheek and lower jaw with redness over the area
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: impression over video only — extent and firmness cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: can only open his mouth about two centimetres
pus and a bad taste weeping from the gum next to the sore back tooth
feels hot and shivery; did not measure a temperature at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective fever — no home thermometer reading taken

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he looks flushed and is in a great deal of pain, pacing and holding an ice pack
several empty boxes of ibuprofen and paracetamol on the bedside table
